ModMetaData.name: I Miss My Limbs (Continued)
ModMetaData.author: Zaljerem
ModMetaData.description:
Original mod by Lewkah0 https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3301381349 If the original author requests it, I will remove this update.
--
I've improved the logic and hardened the Harmony patches and utilities with appropriate null checks.
--
Original mod notes (1.5):
Ever feel that your colonists don't quite react appropriately to losing limbs or getting them replaced with prosthetics? With this mod, they will! Your pawns will now experience a sense of loss and sadness when they lose fingers, toes, arms, or legs. Conversely, they will also feel a sense of relief and happiness when those lost parts are replaced or upgraded with prosthetics.
